The file paths (component.py, dbt_event_iterator.py) are discoverable from the described class/meth

no_solution_leakage.reason: The instruction explicitly states the exact fix: create a type alias named `DbtDagsterEventType`, use a specific import statement, change the return type from `Iterator` to `DbtEventIterator[DbtDagsterEventType]`, and use the forward reference string `"DbtEventIterator[DbtDagsterEventType]"`. solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on gold-specific implementation details: exact variable name `DbtDagsterEventType`, exact string `DbtDagsterEventType: TypeAlias =`, exact import line `from dagster_dbt.core.dbt_event_iterator import DbtDagsterEventType, DbtEventIterator`, and exact forward reference format `"DbtEventIterator[DbtDagsterEventType]"`. A stub or no-op implementation would not pass these tests since they verify specific textual changes that must be made to the existing codebase.
